system.descriptor: Intimidate is the ability to frighten, cow, or bully others through physical presence, threats, or displays of power.
system.uses:
Uses: Frightening enemies, coercing information from unwilling subjects, forcing compliance through threats, staring down opponents.
Special Use: Opposed by Willpower. In combat, a successful Intimidate test as a Full Action can force a single target to flee, cower, or surrender depending on Degrees of Success. NPCs with lower Willpower are more susceptible.

description.value: Intimidate is the ability to frighten, cow, or bully others through physical presence, threats, or displays of power.
